丷.gloss_en: “ears-out” component used in some Chinese characters (e.g. U+5151 兑)

䏍.gloss_en: (same as 肙 蜎) a small worm

𬜯.gloss_en: name of a variety of grass

企.gloss_en: plan a project, stand on tiptoe

尺.gloss_en: traditional Chinese unit of length ~ 1 foot

楼.gloss_en: building of two or more stories

玨.gloss_en: two pieces of jade joined together

呀.gloss_en: particle used to express surprise or mild emphasis

替.gloss_en: take the place of, stand in for

弁.gloss_en: conical cap worn during Zhou dynasty

筑.gloss_en: short name for Guiyang 貴陽|贵阳[Guì​yáng]

触.gloss_en: knock against, touch, to butt with the horns

夹.gloss_en: be wedged or inserted between, pressed from two sides

鬲.gloss_en: type of cauldron with three hollow legs

顷.gloss_en: a measure of area equal to 100 畝 (mu) ~ 6.7 hectares

瑞.gloss_en: token made of jade, lucky, auspicious

综.gloss_en: put together, arrange threads for weaving

㐌.gloss_en: a tribe of savages in South China

臿.gloss_en: to separate the grain from the husk

霸.gloss_en: rule by might rather than right

䩗.gloss_en: (same as 霸) to rule by might rather than right

秒.gloss_en: second (time), beard of grain or corn

㢆.gloss_en: (same as 廛) living space for one family in ancient times

玑.gloss_en: pearl that is not quite round

滕.gloss_en: an ancient state in Shandong province

㞢.gloss_en: (ancient form of 之) to arrive at

氶.gloss_en: name of a river in Shandong

帘.gloss_en: flag used as a shop sign

钧.gloss_en: unit of measure equivalent to thirty catties

伽.gloss_en: transcription of sanskrit 'gha' in buddhist texts ('samgha'

杉.gloss_en: various species of pine and fir

澄.gloss_en: purify water by allowing sediment to settle

梢.gloss_en: pointed tip of something long like a branch

骆.gloss_en: a white horse with black mane

娅.gloss_en: mutual term of address used by sons-in-law

轼.gloss_en: horizontal wooden bar in front of a sedan chair
